question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/NetworkNodeRepository.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: findNetworkNodes()] Can an unprivileged external user pass a null fileId to findNetworkNodes() (which defaults to addressBookFile102), then also pass an explicit fileId=101 to get a different address book, comparing both results to identify nodes that appear in one book but not the other, revealing recently added or removed gossip nodes that may be in a transitional state?
